Elements.Text: ● Even though it is secure against a passive attacker, the DH protocol is vulnerable to a man-in-the-middle attack if the attacker can intercept and modify the messages exchanged by Alice and Bob

Alice          Mallory          Bob          X = g^x \bmod p          T = g^t \bmod p          Y = g^y \bmod p          K_1 = g^{xs} \bmod p          K_2 = g^{yt} \bmod p          Encrypt with K_1               Decrypt with K_1              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2              Encrypt with K_2              Decrypt with K_2
